login.setup.description: Create an API key to secure your server
login.error.min_length: API key must be at least 4 characters
login.error.no_whitespace: API key must not contain whitespace
login.error.setup_failed: Failed to set up API key

status.heading: Serving Stats
status.claude_code.no_models_warning: No models loaded — start omlx with a model to enable Local mode
status.claude_code.haiku_hint: Background tasks & fast ops — choose smallest available
status.claude_code.context_scaling_descr: Scales token usage so Claude Code's auto-compact triggers correctly with smaller context models.
models.manager.heading: Model Manager
models.manager.no_models: No models found in model directory.
models.downloader.heading: Model Downloader
models.downloader.description: Download models from HuggingFace or ModelScope and browse available models.
models.downloader.ms_unavailable: ModelScope SDK not installed. Install with: pip install "omlx[modelscope]"
models.table.name: Name
models.browse.no_trending: No trending models found for your system.
models.browse.no_popular: No popular models found for your system.
models.browse.search_prompt: Enter a search query to find models.
models.oq.heading: oQ Quantization
models.oq.description: Quantize models using oQ mixed-precision strategy for better quality at low bits.
models.oq.no_models: No non-quantized models found in model directories.
models.oq.dtype_help: float16 gives ~20% faster prefill on M1/M2 Apple Silicon (native fp16). bfloat16 is safer on M3/M4 and for numerical stability. Output name appends '-fp16' when float16 is selected.
models.oq.preserve_mtp_help: Keep mtp.* tensors and config fields in the output model so the Native MTP toggle works after quantization. Output name gets a -mtp suffix.
models.oq.preserve_mtp_unavailable: Source model has no MTP heads.
models.oq.enhanced_help: Use imatrix calibration to weight affine quantization by activation importance.
models.oq.imatrix_reuse_cache_help: Use a compatible cached imatrix when available; otherwise collect a new one.
models.oq.imatrix_strict_help: Fail when a quantized tensor has no matching imatrix entry instead of falling back to standard oQ.
models.uploader.heading: Upload oQ Models
models.uploader.description: Upload your locally quantized oQ models to HuggingFace Hub.
models.uploader.invalid_token: Invalid token. Ensure it has write access.
models.uploader.no_oq_models: No oQ models found in model directories.
models.uploader.modal_redownload_hint: Add a notice at the top of README asking previous users to re-download
settings.global.heading: Server Configuration
settings.integrations.heading: Integration Settings
settings.integrations.description: Configure document preprocessing and external tool integrations.
settings.integrations.markitdown.enabled: Preprocess supported file attachments before LLM requests.
settings.integrations.markitdown.expose_: Expose MarkItDown in model lists for direct Markdown conversion requests.
settings.integrations.markitdown.max_fil: Reject larger document attachments before conversion.
Limit document attachments converted in one request.
settings.integrations.markitdown.pdf_pro: Select whether PDF document requests are processed by MarkItDown itself or by an OCR engine.
Scanned or image-only PDFs will fail when MarkItDown is selected, and PDFs with tables may not be processed correctly.
settings.auth.skip_verification_hint: API endpoints will not require authentication
settings.auth.skip_verification_warning: Enabling this on a public network can be a serious security risk
settings.auth.sub_keys_hint: API-only keys. Cannot be used for admin login.
settings.auth.sub_keys_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sub key?
settings.server.restart_confirm:
Restart the oMLX server?

All loaded models will be unloaded. Expected downtime ~7s.
settings.server.restart_status_waiting: Waiting for server to come back…
settings.server.restart_status_timeout: Timed out waiting for server. Check the menu bar app.
settings.model.model_fallback_desc: Use the default model when the requested model is not found
settings.model.hf_cache_desc: Discover MLX-compatible models from the standard Hugging Face Hub cache.
settings.model.idle_timeout_desc: Automatically unload models after inactivity. Per-model TTL overrides this.
settings.resource.guard_tier.label: Reserve level
settings.resource.guard_tier.description: Selecting {tier} lets oMLX reclaim free + inactive memory plus {active_pct}% of active memory ({reclaim_method}).
Custom: oMLX uses your specified ceiling of {custom_gb} GB.
settings.resource.guard_tier.breakdown_c: * Custom ceiling {custom_gb} GB / effective ceiling {ceiling} (kernel limit)
settings.resource.guard_tier.wired_limit: Kernel iogpu.wired_limit_mb is only {kernel}; oMLX can only allocate up to {kernel}. Raise it in Terminal:
settings.resource.hot_cache_description: In-memory cache for frequently accessed KV cache blocks.
settings.resource.hot_cache_zero_note: Reduces SSD I/O latency for repeated prompts.
settings.resource.cold_cache_description: Persistent SSD storage for evicted KV cache blocks.
settings.resource.prefill_memory_guard_d: Pause prefill scheduling and evict LRU models when memory pressure approaches the ceiling derived from the reserve level on the right.
settings.resource.max_concurrent_request: Maximum number of requests processed simultaneously. Higher values increase throughput but use more memory.
settings.resource.embedding_batch_size_h: Maximum number of input texts embedded in one forward pass. Higher values increase throughput but use more memory.
settings.resource.chunked_prefill_descri: Interleave prefill chunks with decode steps. Reduces time-to-first-token for concurrent requests by processing one prefill chunk per step instead of blocking decode.
settings.cache.hot_cache_only_hint: Keep KV cache in RAM only. No SSD writes, cache cleared on restart.
settings.generation.max_context_window_h: Used only when a model does not declare its native context length.
settings.generation.max_context_window_p: Optional cap for discovered model context windows. Leave empty for no cap; per-model overrides can exceed it.
settings.huggingface.endpoint_hint: Custom endpoint URL for HuggingFace API (e.g. https://hf-mirror.com)
settings.huggingface.endpoint_clear_hint: To use the default endpoint, clear the field and save.
settings.advanced.burst_decode_hint: Process tokens in batches internally for faster generation. Higher levels run faster but stream in larger chunks; lower levels stream more smoothly. Applies instantly, no restart.
settings.advanced.preserve_mid_system_ca: Preserve Prefix Cache for Mid-Conversation System Notes

When a model's chat template cannot render system or developer messages after the first turn, oMLX rewrites safe trailing notes into the nearest user message so long conversation history can remain prefix-cacheable. Tool call and tool result sequences are left unchanged.
settings.advanced.initial_cache_blocks_h: Blocks pre-allocated at startup. Higher values reduce dynamic allocation overhead.
settings.advanced.sse_keepalive_mode_hin: How streaming HTTP connections stay alive during long prefills. 'Chunk' is most compatible (default). Switch to 'Comment' for the legacy ': keep-alive' format, or 'Off' to disable.
settings.language.label: Interface Language
settings.models.heading: Available Models
settings.models.description: Configure per-model settings including sampling parameters.
settings.models.no_models_description: Add models to your model directory to get started.
modal.model_settings.enable_thinking_hin: Enable reasoning/thinking mode for this model.
modal.model_settings.thinking_budget_hin: Limit thinking tokens for reasoning models. Forces end of thinking when exceeded.
modal.model_settings.guided_grammar_hint: Apply an EBNF grammar by default for this model.
modal.model_settings.limit_tool_result_h: Truncate large tool results (e.g. file reads) to a token limit
modal.model_settings.turboquant_kv_hint: Compress KV cache using vector quantization. Lower bits = more compression, higher bits = better quality. Supports 2 to 8 bits.
modal.model_settings.mtp_hint:
Use the model's built-in MTP head for ~1.5× faster single-request decoding. (Qwen 3.5/3.6 and Deepseek-v4 only)
Single-stream only: requests run one at a time.
* mlx-lm PR #990 by AirRunner, PR #15 by 0xClandestine
modal.model_settings.mtp_conflict: Disable DFlash and TurboQuant KV first — they patch the same path MTP relies on.
modal.model_settings.vlm_mtp_hint: Speculative decoding via an external MTP drafter model (Gemma 4 assistant or Qwen MTP). ~1.3–1.6× single-request speedup; concurrent eligible requests fall back to standard batching.
modal.model_settings.vlm_mtp_conflict: Disable DFlash / SpecPrefill / MTP / TurboQuant KV first — VLM MTP owns the speculative decode path.
modal.model_settings.vlm_mtp_draft_model: Select an assistant or MTP drafter…
modal.model_settings.vlm_mtp_block_size: Draft block size (tokens per round, blank = 4)
modal.model_settings.index_cache_hint: Skip redundant indexer computation in DSA layers (DeepSeek V3/GLM-5).
modal.model_settings.force_sampling_hint: Override request sampling parameters with configured values
modal.model_settings.trust_remote_code_h: Lets the model repo run arbitrary Python at load. Only enable for trusted publishers.
modal.model_settings.kwarg_force_tooltip: Force: API requests cannot override this value
modal.model_settings.empty_hint: Leave empty to use global defaults
modal.model_settings.profiles.expose_eng: Engine-level settings in this profile only take effect when it is applied to the base model — they don't change the exposed model.
modal.model_settings.profiles.drift_hint: Form has unsaved changes vs. profile
modal.model_settings.profiles.invalid_na: API name must be lowercase letters, digits, underscore, or dash (1-32 chars)
logs.heading: Server Logs
logs.description: View real-time server logs with auto-refresh.
logs.placeholder: No logs available. Start the server to generate logs.
logs.level_tooltip: Filters what is shown here only — does not affect the log file's save level
bench.heading: Performance Benchmark
bench.description: Measure inference speed for single requests and continuous batching. All other models will be unloaded before benchmarking.
bench.config.force_lm_engine_hint: Use mlx-lm for this benchmark. VLM MTP drafters are ignored, so results measure the LM-only baseline.
bench.results.batch.subtitle: pp1024 / tg128
bench.upload_skipped.title: Community Upload Skipped
bench.upload_skipped.reason: Experimental features were enabled while running this benchmark. Results are not uploaded to omlx.ai community benchmarks because the numbers are not comparable to standard runs.
bench.metrics.ttft.name: TTFT
bench.metrics.test.tooltip: Test case label in the format ppN/tgM. 'pp' = prompt processing (number of input tokens), 'tg' = token generation (number of output tokens). For example, pp1024/tg256 means 1024 input tokens and 256 output tokens.
bench.metrics.ttft.tooltip: Time to First Token — how long the user waits before seeing any output. The model must read and process the entire prompt (prefill phase) before generating the first token. Longer prompts = higher TTFT. Measured in milliseconds. Lower is better.
bench.metrics.tpot.tooltip: Time Per Output Token — average interval between consecutive output tokens during the generation (decode) phase. Directly affects how fast text appears on screen. For example, 20ms/tok means ~50 tokens per second. Lower is better.
bench.metrics.tg_tps.tooltip: Token Generation TPS — number of output tokens produced per second during the decode phase. This is the inverse of TPOT (e.g., TPOT 20ms = 50 tg TPS). The primary measure of how fast the model writes its response. Higher is better.
bench.metrics.pp_tps.tooltip: Prompt Processing TPS — how many input tokens the model processes per second during the prefill phase. Higher values mean the model reads your prompt faster, which directly reduces TTFT. Important for long-context workloads. Higher is better.
bench.metrics.e2e.tooltip: End-to-End Latency — total wall-clock time from sending the request to receiving the complete response. Equals TTFT + (TPOT x number of output tokens). This is the overall time the user waits for a full answer.
bench.metrics.throughput.tooltip: Total Throughput — combined input and output tokens processed per second. Shows overall system utilization including both prefill and generation. Useful for comparing total compute efficiency across different prompt lengths.
bench.metrics.peak_mem.tooltip: Peak GPU Memory — maximum GPU (unified) memory used during inference for this test case. Includes model weights, KV cache, and intermediate activations. Helps estimate how large a model your hardware can handle.
bench.metrics.batch_size.tooltip: Batch Size — number of requests processed simultaneously. Batching lets the GPU handle multiple requests at once, increasing total throughput but adding some latency per individual request. A 2x batch doesn't mean 2x speed due to memory bandwidth limits.
bench.metrics.speedup.tooltip: Speedup — how much faster token generation is compared to a single request (1x baseline). For example, 1.8x means batching produces tokens 1.8 times faster overall. Values above 1x show more efficient GPU utilization through batching.
bench.metrics.pp_tps_req.tooltip: Per-Request Prompt Processing TPS — the pp TPS divided by the batch size. Shows how fast each individual request's prompt is processed when sharing the GPU with other requests. Expect this to be lower than the single-request pp TPS since compute is shared.
bench.metrics.avg_ttft.tooltip: Average Time to First Token across all requests in the batch. Higher than single-request TTFT because the GPU must process multiple prompts. Shows the typical wait time each user experiences under batched workloads.
bench.metrics.ttft.description: Latency until the model starts responding. Measures prompt processing (prefill) speed. Lower is better.
bench.metrics.tpot.name: TPOT
bench.metrics.tpot.description: Average time between each generated token. Measures decode speed. Lower is better.
bench.metrics.tg_tps.name: tg TPS
bench.metrics.tg_tps.description: Output tokens generated per second. Inverse of TPOT. Higher is better.
bench.metrics.pp_tps.name: pp TPS
bench.metrics.pp_tps.description: Input/prompt tokens processed per second during prefill. Higher is better.
bench.metrics.e2e.name: E2E Latency
bench.metrics.e2e.description: Total time from request submission to complete response. Includes prefill + generation.
bench.metrics.throughput.name: Total Throughput
bench.metrics.throughput.description: Overall tokens (input + output) per second. Measures total system utilization.
bench.metrics.batch_size.name: Batch Size
bench.metrics.batch_size.description: Number of concurrent requests processed together. Higher batch sizes improve total throughput but increase per-request latency.
bench.metrics.speedup.name: Speedup
bench.metrics.speedup.description: Token generation throughput multiplier compared to single-request baseline (1x). Higher is better.
bench.metrics.pp_tps_req.name: pp TPS/req
bench.metrics.pp_tps_req.description: Prompt processing throughput divided by batch size. Shows per-request prefill speed under batching load.
acc_bench.heading: Intelligence Benchmark
acc_bench.description: Evaluate model intelligence across knowledge, reasoning, math, and coding benchmarks. All other models will be unloaded before benchmarking.
acc_bench.config.benchmarks_hint: Fixed seed sampling ensures the same questions across different models for fair comparison. Select Full for the complete dataset.
acc_bench.config.livecodebench_warning: LiveCodeBench executes model-generated code on your machine (sandboxed with timeout and memory limits).
acc_bench.config.batch_size_hint: Process multiple questions concurrently. Higher batch size = faster but uses more memory.
acc_bench.config.thinking_hint: Defaults to model's Enable Thinking setting. Auto-detects if the model thinks even when disabled.
chat.title: Chat - oMLX Admin
chat.api_key_prompt: Enter your API key to start chatting
chat.welcome_description: Start a conversation with your local MLX models. Select a model above to begin.
chat.welcome_privacy: All conversations run locally on your device.
chat.input_placeholder: Type a message... (Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.confirm_change_api_key: Are you sure you want to change your API key?
chat.confirm_delete_chat: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
chat.confirm_clear_all: Are you sure you want to delete ALL chat history? This cannot be undone.
chat.error.incorrect_api_key: API key is incorrect. Please re-enter your API key.
chat.system_prompt.title: System Prompt
chat.system_prompt.description: Set instructions for the model. Applied to all messages in this chat.
chat.system_prompt.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant. Be concise.
chat.error.image_too_large: Image size must be less than 10MB
chat.error.image_load_failed: Failed to load image. Please try again.
chat.error.invalid_document_type: Only PDF, DOCX, PPTX, TXT, and MD documents are supported.
chat.error.document_too_large: Document size exceeds the MarkItDown limit.
chat.error.document_load_failed: Failed to load document. Please try again.
js.error.api_key_min_length: API key must be at least 4 characters
js.error.api_key_no_whitespace: API key must not contain whitespace
js.info.model_type_reload_required: Model type changed. Unload and reload the model for the change to take effect.
js.info.model_settings_auto_unloaded: Settings saved. The model was unloaded and will reload with the new settings on next use.
js.info.model_settings_auto_reloaded: Settings saved. The pinned model was reloaded with the new settings.
js.error.no_config_defaults: No config defaults found for this model
js.error.select_prompt_length: Select at least one prompt length
js.error.start_download_connection: Failed to start download. Check server connection.
js.error.delete_model_connection: Failed to delete model. Check server connection.
